allow:
Bash(cat > setup-public-access.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "=========================================="
echo "配置公网访问 - 自动化脚本"
echo "=========================================="
echo ""

# 颜色定义
RED='\\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\\033[1;33m'
NC='\\033[0m' # No Color

# 获取公网IP
PUBLIC_IP=$\(curl -s ifconfig.me\)
echo -e "${GREEN}检测到公网IP: ${PUBLIC_IP}${NC}"
echo ""

# 1. 检查Docker
echo "1. 检查Docker环境..."
if ! command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
    echo -e "${RED}错误: Docker未安装${NC}"
    exit 1
fi
if ! command -v docker-compose &> /dev/null; then
    echo -e "${RED}错误: Docker Compose未安装${NC}"
    exit 1
fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Docker环境正常${NC}"
echo ""

# 2. 检查防火墙
echo "2. 检查防火墙配置..."
if command -v ufw &> /dev/null; then
    UFW_STATUS=$\(sudo ufw status | grep "Status:" | awk '{print $2}'\)
    if [ "$UFW_STATUS" = "active" ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}防火墙已启用${NC}"
        
        # 检查80端口
        if sudo ufw status | grep -q "80/tcp"; then
            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 端口80已开放${NC}"
        else
            echo -e "${YELLOW}正在开放端口80...${NC}"
            sudo ufw allow 80/tcp
            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 端口80已开放${NC}"
        fi
        
        # 检查22端口（SSH）
        if sudo ufw status | grep -q "22/tcp"; then
            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ SSH端口22已开放${NC}"
        else
            echo -e "${YELLOW}正在开放SSH端口22...${NC}"
            sudo ufw allow 22/tcp
            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ SSH端口22已开放${NC}"
        fi
    else
        echo -e "${YELLOW}防火墙未启用，建议启用以提高安全性${NC}"
        read -p "是否启用防火墙？\(y/n\) " -n 1 -r
        echo
        if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
            sudo ufw allow 22/tcp
            sudo ufw allow 80/tcp
            sudo ufw --force enable
            echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 防火墙已启用并配置${NC}"
        fi
    fi
else
    echo -e "${YELLOW}未检测到ufw防火墙${NC}"
fi
echo ""

# 3. 检查端口占用
echo "3. 检查端口80占用情况..."
if sudo netstat -tulpn | grep -q ":80 "; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}警告: 端口80已被占用${NC}"
    sudo netstat -tulpn | grep ":80 "
    echo ""
    read -p "是否继续？\(y/n\) " -n 1 -r
    echo
    if [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 端口80可用${NC}"
fi
echo ""

# 4. 停止现有容器
echo "4. 停止现有容器（如果存在）..."
if docker ps -a | grep -q exam-system; then
    docker-compose down
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 已停止现有容器${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 无需停止容器${NC}"
fi
echo ""

# 5. 构建镜像
echo "5. 构建Docker镜像..."
docker-compose build
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 镜像构建完成${NC}"
echo ""

# 6. 启动容器
echo "6. 启动容器..."
docker-compose up -d
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 容器已启动${NC}"
echo ""

# 7. 等待容器就绪
echo "7. 等待容器就绪..."
sleep 5
echo ""

# 8. 检查容器状态
echo "8. 检查容器状态..."
if docker ps | grep -q exam-system; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 容器运行正常${NC}"
    docker-compose ps
else
    echo -e "${RED}错误: 容器未运行${NC}"
    echo "查看日志："
    docker-compose logs --tail=20 exam-system
    exit 1
fi
echo ""

# 9. 测试本地访问
echo "9. 测试本地访问..."
if curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost | grep -q "200\\|301\\|302"; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ 本地访问正常${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${RED}警告: 本地访问失败${NC}"
    echo "查看日志："
    docker-compose logs --tail=20 exam-system
fi
echo ""

# 10. 显示访问信息
echo "=========================================="
echo -e "${GREEN}配置完成！${NC}"
echo "=========================================="
echo ""
echo "访问地址："
echo -e "  本地访问: ${GREEN}http://localhost${NC}"
echo -e "  公网访问: ${GREEN}http://${PUBLIC_IP}${NC}"
echo ""
echo "常用命令："
echo "  查看日志: docker-compose logs -f exam-system"
echo "  停止服务: docker-compose down"
echo "  重启服务: docker-compose restart"
echo ""
echo -e "${YELLOW}重要提醒：${NC}"
echo "1. 如果使用云服务器，请在云控制台配置安全组，开放80端口"
echo "2. 生产环境强烈建议配置HTTPS（详见 PUBLIC_IP_SETUP.md）"
echo "3. 首次访问后立即修改默认管理员密码"
echo "4. 建议设置自动备份（详见 PRODUCTION_NOTES.md）"
echo ""
echo "详细文档："
echo "  - PUBLIC_IP_SETUP.md（公网访问配置）"
echo "  - DOCKER_GUIDE.md（Docker使用指南）"
echo "  - PRODUCTION_NOTES.md（生产环境部署）"
echo ""
EOF
chmod +x setup-public-access.sh && echo "脚本创建成功")
Bash(python3 -m pip uninstall -y pyOpenSSL cryptography && python3 -m pip install pyOpenSSL --upgrade)

Bash(docker run -d \\
  --name exam-system \\
  -p 0.0.0.0:80:80 \\
  -v exam_data:/var/www/html/data \\
  -v exam_uploads:/var/www/html/uploads \\
  -v exam_sessions:/var/www/html/sessions \\
  --restart unless-stopped \\
  exam-system:latest)

Bash(docker stop exam-system && docker rm exam-system && docker build -t exam-system:latest . 2>&1 | grep -E "\(Successfully|Error\)" && docker run -d --name exam-system -p 0.0.0.0:80:80 -v exam_data:/var/www/html/data -v exam_uploads:/var/www/html/uploads -v exam_sessions:/var/www/html/sessions --restart unless-stopped exam-system:latest)
Bash(echo "=== 本地访问测试 ===" && curl -I http://localhost 2>&1 | head -10 && echo "" && echo "=== 端口监听检查 ===" && sudo netstat -tulpn | grep :80)
Bash(echo "=== 防火墙状态 ===" && sudo ufw status | grep -E "\(Status|80\)" && echo "" && echo "=== 获取实际页面内容 ===" && curl -s http://localhost | head -20)

Bash(\\
docker stop exam-system && \\
docker rm exam-system && \\
docker build -t exam-system:latest . 2>&1 | grep -E "\(Step 10|Successfully\)" && \\
docker run -d --name exam-system \\
  -p 0.0.0.0:80:80 \\
  -v exam_data:/var/www/html/data \\
  -v exam_uploads:/var/www/html/uploads \\
  -v exam_sessions:/var/www/html/sessions \\
  --restart unless-stopped \\
  exam-system:latest && \\
echo "等待容器启动..." && sleep 5 && \\
docker ps | grep exam)

Bash(echo "=== 检查容器状态 ===" && \\
docker ps | grep exam && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== 检查示例JSON文件 ===" && \\
ls -lh /home/ubuntu/test-system/exam_system/sample_questions.json && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "=== 验证JSON格式 ===" && \\
python3 -m json.tool /home/ubuntu/test-system/exam_system/sample_questions.json > /dev/null && echo "✓ JSON格式正确" || echo "✗ JSON格式错误")

Bash(docker stop exam-system && \\
docker rm exam-system && \\
docker build -t exam-system:latest . 2>&1 | tail -5 && \\
docker run -d --name exam-system \\
  -p 0.0.0.0:80:80 \\
  -v exam_data:/var/www/html/data \\
  -v exam_uploads:/var/www/html/uploads \\
  -v exam_sessions:/var/www/html/sessions \\
  --restart unless-stopped \\
  exam-system:latest && \\
echo "等待容器启动..." && sleep 5 && \\
docker ps | grep exam)
Bash(docker stop exam-system && docker rm exam-system && docker build -t exam-system:latest . 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(docker run -d --name exam-system \\
  -p 0.0.0.0:80:80 \\

sleep 5 && docker ps | grep exam)

Bash(sleep 3 && \\
echo "=== 容器状态 ===" && docker ps | grep exam && \\
echo "" && echo "=== 数据库表 ===" && \\
docker exec exam-system sqlite3 /var/www/html/exam_system.db ".tables" && \\
echo "" && echo "=== submission_details表结构 ===" && \\

echo "" && echo "=== 页面测试 ===" && \\
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "首页: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost/ && \\
